script: const translate=async(e,t,n,a,r)=>{let o=getRandomNumber(),s={jsonrpc:"2.0",method:"LMT_handle_texts",params:{splitting:"newlines",lang:{source_lang_user_selected:t,target_lang:n},texts:[{text:e,requestAlternatives:3}],timestamp:getTimeStamp(getICount(e))},id:o},p=JSON.stringify(s);p=(o+5)%29==0||(o+3)%13==0?p.replace('"method":"','"method" : "'):p.replace('"method":"','"method": "'),console.log(p);let i=(await a.request({method:"post",maxBodyLength:1/0,url:"https://www2.deepl.com/jsonrpc",headers:{"Content-Type":"application/json; charset=utf-8","x-app-os-name":"iOS","x-app-os-version":"16.3.0","Accept-Language":"en-US,en;q=0.9","x-app-device":"iPhone13,2","User-Agent":"DeepL-iOS/2.6.0 iOS 16.3.0 (iPhone13,2)","x-app-build":"353933","x-app-version":"2.6",Cookie:"LMTBID=v2|b9c7fb59-034e-4d1b-9cb1-28bfd29d1f22|10bc46f0a01258d9c33e6c1a02cc3a84"},data:p})).data;return i&&i.result&&i.result.texts?i.result.texts[0].text.trim():"Error happens"};function getTimeStamp(e){let t=Date.now();return 0!==e?t-t%(e+=1)+e:t}function getICount(e){return e.split("i").length-1}function getRandomNumber(){return 1e3*(Math.floor(99999*Math.random())+1e5)}window.translate=translate;
